---
title: "Custom genesets"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Custom genesets}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
custom <- list(IFN_response = c("STAT1", "IRF1", "CXCL10"))
sc <- score_pathway(expr = toy_expr$expr, meta = toy_expr$meta, geneset = custom, seurat = FALSE)
```
